title: 毎日王冠の後に・震えちまう脚

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Racer with Purple Scrunchie
text_block_list.text:
Inari's unbelievable! To think she'd be able to do
so well against the best runners in her generation!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Damn iiiit! I lost!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: (And my legs won't stop shakin'!)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(This never happened before. Oguri's runnin' was
so powerful and suffocatin', it almost feels like
she's still chasin' me down...)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Oh, wait. Oguri...

text_block_list.name: Male Spectator
text_block_list.text:
You were so close, Oguri! I'm sure you'll win next
time!

text_block_list.name: Female Spectator
text_block_list.text:
I'll be cheering for you at the autumn Tenno Sho
too!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I'll do my best to win it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: (She's so imposing. The shadow she casts is huge.)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: (Compared to her, I'm...)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Damn it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Leaving the racecourse with Inari One, I can't
help but notice the hard look on her face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I rack my brain, trying to come up with the right
words to say...

text_block_list.name: Spectator
text_block_list.text:
Inari One sure was incredible! I didn't think she
had it in her to go head-to-head with Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Spectator
text_block_list.text:
I guess they're kinda similar. They both got too
good for regional races and had to come out
here. They grew too big for their little ponds.

text_block_list.name: Spectator
text_block_list.text:
But... it's also pretty hard to get noticed in the
regionals. They must be putting in a lot of extra
work to grab people's attention.

text_block_list.name: Spectator
text_block_list.text: Exactly. Seeing Inari One today convinced me it would've been a waste for her to stay in the regionals. That's why she's in the centrals!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Ya got it all wrong! That's not why I'm here...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have a feeling it'd be best to get Inari away from
everyone as quickly as possible.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Right, sorry. Let's get goin'.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One applies herself passionately to training
for the autumn Tenno Sho, but I keep catching
glimpses of a pained expression on her face.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whazza matter, Boss? You all right? Could scare
the clouds away with that face you're makin'!
choice_data_list: I should be asking if you're all right.
I should be asking if you're all right.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whazza matter, Boss? You all right? Could scare
the clouds away with that face you're makin'!
choice_data_list: I should be asking if you're all right.
I should be asking if you're all right.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
'Course I am! No need to worry 'bout me! Sure,
I've been a bit down 'cause the weather's been all
gloomy lately, but that's all!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
More importantly, I realized somethin'. I'm
nowhere good enough to win the autumn Tenno
Sho right now!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Creek's gonna be there too, not just Oguri! That
means I gotta put the pedal to the metal 'n' train
like hell!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Creek's gonna be there too, not just Oguri! That
means I gotta put the pedal to the metal 'n' train
like hell!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seems like I'll have to keep a close eye on her. I
might have to intervene if it comes down to it, to
ensure her own safety.
choice_data_list: (Even if it isn't what she wants...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As her trainer and faithful partner in all this, I
have to be ready.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: (This is bad. Even Boss's worryin' about me now...)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: (This is bad. Even Boss's worryin' about me now...)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(I'm feelin' all sortsa antsy lately, though. I can't
even focus in trainin'... I gotta get my head on
straight, pronto.)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(The others must be dead focused on trainin'.
They're probably workin' way harder than me,
workin' at levels leagues above my own!)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: (But me...)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: (My runnin's nowhere near good enough to really show off how incredible the people of Oi are.)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(If I can't become Umamusume of the Year, my
performance on the track 'n' the claims I made'll
be for nothing!)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(The stakes're so high, but there's no way I can
beat Oguri and Creek right now.)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(At this rate, I won't be able to answer everyone's
hopes...)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Ugh! I know I gotta eat, but my appetite's busted.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Damn it all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho looms in the distance, and
it won't be long at all until it's upon us.
